input:
RESTRICTED — DIVORCE PROCEEDING
Property: villa, El Rosario, Marbella East, 5 bed, pool, sea views.
Both spouses are parties to the sale — they are divorcing.
The husband (Belgian) is represented by a lawyer in Brussels.
The wife (Spanish) is in Marbella and is the primary contact.
Court has ordered the property sold and proceeds split equally.
Neither party can block the sale but both must sign the notarial deed.
The husband's lawyer has indicated he may delay signing to extract
a better personal financial settlement from his wife on unrelated
family matters. This could delay completion by weeks or months.
Asking €1.9M. Court has set a minimum sale price of €1.7M based
on an independent valuation — no flexibility below this figure.
Property itself is excellent — full legal, modern construction, no issues.
Categories: C1 (nationalities), C2 (divorce court order, mandatory sale), C3 (court-mandated minimum €1.7M), C8 (timeline risk from spousal legal strategy)
output:
TAGS: [Sea views] [Modern construction] [Private pool] [Priced for quick sale] [Verify completion timeline] [El Rosario location]

DESCRIPTION: This modern five-bedroom villa in El Rosario features stunning sea views and a private swimming pool. The property is ideal for families seeking a contemporary lifestyle in the prestigious Marbella East area. This residence is available for immediate consideration.
